meta.title: Taste Garden — Asian all-you-can-eat world cuisine in Izegem
meta.description: Teppanyaki, wok, sushi and dessert — freshly prepared and all-you-can-eat. Reserve your table at Taste Garden, Kortrijksestraat 276, Izegem.

hero.subtitle: Teppanyaki, wok, sushi and dessert — prepared à la minute and yours to enjoy without limits, in the heart of Izegem.

concept.title: One price. The whole world on your plate.
concept.body: At Taste Garden you don't choose — you taste it all. At our open kitchens the chefs prepare your dishes à la minute, from sizzling teppanyaki to sushi rolled before your eyes. Sit back, take your time and enjoy without limits.

stations.title: Four kitchens, live before your eyes
stations.intro: Walk past our open stations and let yourself be surprised — every dish is made fresh for you.

items.name: Teppanyaki
items.description: On the searing teppan the chef sears wagyu, prawns and vegetables — crisp outside, melting within.

items.name: Wok
items.description: Build your own bowl from fresh ingredients and sauces. The chef stir-fries it all over a roaring flame.

items.name: Sushi bar
items.description: Maki, nigiri and California rolls, made fresh on a loop at our sushi bar.

items.name: Dessert & ice cream
items.description: Fine patisserie, fresh fruit and an all-you-can-eat ice cream bar to finish in style.

dishes.title: A taste of tonight
dishes.intro: Fresh, generous and made with care — night after night.

formules.title: Unlimited dining, one clear price
formules.intro: Soft drinks, draft beer, house wine, coffee and tea are all included.

birthday.title: Birthday this week?
birthday.body: Celebrate your birthday with us and enjoy €15 off when you come with 3 or more adults — valid up to 3 days after your birthday.

formules.note: Reservation recommended, especially on festive days.

ambiance.quote: Where the warmth of a garden meets the flavours of Asia.
ambiance.body: Warm lanterns, open kitchens and the scent of the teppan. Taste Garden is a real evening out — with friends, with family, or for that one special moment.

reservation.title: Reserve your table
reservation.intro: Leave us your details — we'll confirm your reservation as soon as possible. Prefer to call? You're always welcome to.

success.title: Thank you for your request!
success.body: We've received your reservation and will get back to you shortly to confirm.

reservation.error: Something went wrong. Feel free to call us on 051 30 38 88.

footer.tagline: Asian all-you-can-eat world cuisine in the heart of Izegem.
